runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 390m in 22.62 last start, beating Got A Scan. Likes the rails so the last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.47) when seventh over 390m at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by a neck at this track over 390m (22.74) beating Destini Lorenzo in Grade 5 on April 10. Can keep things rolling.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.76) when fifth over 390m at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth on April 10 over 390m at this track behind Princess Domi, beaten 2.75 lengths (22.90) in a Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked soon after start and fell.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.43) at Warragul in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Expected to be in the finish.

runners.formComment: At the last start finished last on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Big Boy Cabang beaten 15 lengths (23.14) in a Special conditions Veteran race. Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.

formComments.comment: At the last start finished last on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Big Boy Cabang beaten 15 lengths (23.14) in a Special conditions Veteran race. Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.

runners.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Temora to win by 0.8 lengths in 19.37, beating Dana Curly. Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on March 15 over 330m at Temora behind Tiggerlong Snow beaten 6 lengths (19.41). Others read better.
